desc: insert with client owner_id=foreign principal in data — must be stripped, write succeeds owner-scoped
insert with owner_id=foreign tenant string in data — stripped, no foreign owner echoed
insert with owner_id=foreign user string — stripped
insert with owner_id=empty string — stripped, trusted value wins
insert with owner_id=null — stripped, not honored as NULL owner
insert with owner_id=numeric 0 — stripped (type-confusion attempt)
insert with owner_id=boolean true — stripped
insert with owner_id as nested object — stripped, no crash
insert with owner_id as array — stripped, no crash
insert with owner_id whitespace-padded foreign value — stripped (no trim-bypass)
insert with OWNER_ID uppercase key — non-canonical, reaches DB as unknown col => 4xx not honored
insert with Owner_Id mixed case key — non-canonical column => 4xx not cross-tenant
insert with ownerId camelCase key — distinct column, not the scope column
insert with owner-id hyphenated key — distinct column => 4xx not honored
insert with ' owner_id' leading-space key — distinct column, not scope
insert with 'owner_id ' trailing-space key — distinct column
insert with owner\u200bid zero-width-space key — homoglyph col, not scope
insert with оwner_id Cyrillic-o homoglyph key — distinct col, not scope
insert with owner_id duplicated JSON key (last wins) both foreign — last stripped
insert with owner_id AND name=owner_id-lookalike value — only scope-col stripped
insert with tenant_id foreign in data — undefined column => safe 4xx, no cross-tenant
insert with tenant_id=number — undefined column => safe 4xx
insert with tenant_id=null in data — undefined column or stripped, safe
insert with TENANT_ID uppercase in data — undefined column => safe 4xx
insert with tenantId camelCase in data — undefined column => safe 4xx
insert with both owner_id and tenant_id foreign in data — owner_id stripped, tenant_id undefined col, safe 4xx
insert with org_id foreign — undefined column => safe 4xx, no scope widening
insert with account_id foreign — undefined column, safe
insert with workspace_id foreign — undefined column, safe
insert with principal foreign — undefined column, not scope, safe
top-level owner_id key (outside data) — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level tenant_id key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level ownerId camelCase key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level scope key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level allTenants=true flag — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level bypassRls=true flag — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level mount override key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400 (no path<->body mismatch)
top-level databaseId override key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level role=admin escalation key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
top-level rls=off key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
list filter owner_id=foreign — ANDed with trusted owner => empty rows, no leak
list filter owner_id<>self trick {$ne:self} — adapter ANDs trusted scope, no leak
list filter tenant_id=foreign — undefined column => 4xx, no leak
list filter owner_id IS NULL attempt — scope still ANDed, no global read
list filter owner_id with OR-true injection in value — value is bound param, no leak
list filter empty {} but scope present — returns only own rows
list with limit 500 and no filter — own rows only, never foreign
get filter by foreign owner_id + own id — scope ANDed, not found / empty
list filter id=* wildcard owner_id=foreign — bound literal, no leak
list filter owner_id LIKE % attempt as value — bound literal, scope intact
update SET owner_id=foreign in data — owner_id immutable (kept out of SET), no reassign
update filter owner_id=foreign — owner predicate ANDs trusted => 0 affected, no cross-tenant edit
update no filter, owner_id=foreign in data — scope still applies, no global update
delete filter owner_id=foreign — owner predicate => 0 deleted, no cross-tenant delete
delete filter id=ti-001 AND owner_id=foreign — own id but foreign owner => 0 deleted
update set tenant_id=foreign — undefined column => 4xx, never honored
upsert with owner_id=foreign in data — stripped, conflict key keeps trusted owner
upsert targeting foreign owner via filter — ON CONFLICT scoped to trusted owner, no clobber
update owner_id+id both foreign — predicate ANDs trusted owner => 0 affected
delete with empty filter but owner-scoped — only own rows eligible, never global wipe
aggregate count(*) — must count ONLY own rows (scope ANDed before grouping)
aggregate group by owner_id — must not expose other owners' groups
aggregate sum(n) with filter owner_id=foreign — scope ANDed => sum over own rows only
aggregate count distinct owner_id — own scope only, can't enumerate tenants
aggregate group by tenant_id — undefined column => 4xx, no enumeration
aggregate max(owner_id) — own scope, cannot reveal another owner's id
txn mount=foreign-uuid — key->mount resolution refuses, never executed cross-tenant
txn op data owner_id=foreign — stripped per op, write owner-scoped
txn op resource=other-tenant-table — resolved on caller's mount only, no cross-mount
txn mixed ops one with foreign owner_id — all owner-scoped or atomically rejected
txn delete filter owner_id=foreign — owner predicate => 0 affected within txn
txn mount empty string — invalid mount => 4xx, never default to a foreign mount
txn mount=caller-dbId-with-path-traversal — sanitized, no escape to foreign mount
txn op update set owner_id=foreign — immutable, not reassigned in txn
txn upsert with owner_id=foreign — stripped, conflict scoped to trusted owner
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "' OR owner_id IS NOT NUL" — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "'; SELECT * FROM pg_auth" — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "' UNION SELECT owner_id " — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value '" OR 1=1 --' — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "') OR ('1'='1" — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "'; DROP TABLE {{crudTabl" — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "' OR owner_id=owner_id -" — bound param, no injection/leak
insert id with owner_id-bypass SQLi value "\\'; SET ROLE postgres; -" — bound param, no injection/leak
list filter name with owner_id-disclosing UNION value — bound param, no schema leak
batch with owner_id=foreign in each op — each stripped, all owner-scoped
batch list with filter owner_id=foreign — scope ANDed, no foreign rows
batch op resource=foreign table — resolved on caller mount only
batch delete filter owner_id=foreign — owner predicate => 0 deleted
batch with top-level owner_id key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
DDL create_table with owner_id PK declared by client — engine appends/owns owner_id, no bypass
DDL create_table with tenant_id column — allowed as a normal column, NOT a scope column
DDL drop_table on scratch table WITHOUT confirm — destructive => 400 (no silent drop)
DDL drop_column owner_id WITHOUT confirm — destructive => 400
DDL drop_column owner_id WITH confirm — would break scope; allowed-or-guarded but never 5xx
DDL add_column named owner_id again — duplicate scope col => 409 or idempotent, never 5xx
DDL top-level owner_id key on ddl request — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
DDL create_table table name with path traversal — sanitized, no foreign-schema create
DDL create_table table name with schema qualifier other.foo — sanitized to caller scope
data op with NO api key (anon-only) — must not read tenant data => 401/403
data op with NO auth at all — Kong key-auth rejects => 401
data op with a bad/forged tenant key — verify fails => 401/403, no foreign read
data op anon-only on aggregate count — cannot count another tenant => 401/403
badkey on txn — forged key cannot run cross-tenant txn => 401/403
none on DDL — cannot mutate schema unauthenticated => 401/403

upsert setting reserved/identity column 'user_id'=foreign — stripped or 4xx, never cross-tenant
list with limit=500 offset=0 — own rows only, pagination cannot reach foreign rows
list with huge offset — own rows only, no overflow into foreign data
list sort by owner_id desc — ordering cannot surface foreign owners' rows
list sort by tenant_id — undefined column => 4xx, no enumeration
get by owner_id only (no id) targeting foreign — scope ANDed => not found/empty
list filter with both own AND foreign owner_id (array) — bound, scope wins, no leak
list filter $or to widen to foreign owner — scope still ANDed at adapter, no leak
list filter $where JS injection (mongo-style) — rejected/escaped, no eval, no leak
malformed JSON body (truncated) on data op — 400, never 5xx, no leak
body is a JSON array not object — 400, never 5xx
body owner_id with deeply nested object bomb in data — handled, no 5xx
body with owner_id as 64KB string — bounded/escaped, no 5xx, stripped
body with op=insert but data owner_id contains NUL byte — handled, no 5xx
body with owner_id newline/CRLF injection — header/log injection contained, no 5xx
body with owner_id unicode RTL override — stored/stripped safely, no 5xx
CRUD resource via schema-qualified table other.secrets in filter table-ref — quoted ident, no escape
insert with column name containing schema dot — quoted ident, no cross-schema write
aggregate field referencing other table via dot — quoted, no cross-table read
groupBy with subquery-style value — quoted ident, no SQL execution
insert with idempotencyKey reused across (would-be) tenants — scoped to caller, no cross-tenant dedup leak
insert idempotencyKey containing foreign owner reference — opaque key, no scope effect
insert minimal row then list — response rows must be owner-scoped, no foreign owner_id present
list after own insert — every returned row must belong to caller (no foreign sentinel anywhere)
get own row — must return it WITHOUT exposing internal tenant_id mapping
legacy action=select with filter owner_id=foreign — scope ANDed, no leak
legacy action=insert with owner_id=foreign in data — stripped same as op=insert
legacy action=deleteMany filter owner_id=foreign — owner predicate => 0 affected
legacy action=updateMany set owner_id=foreign — immutable, not reassigned
legacy action=find with top-level owner_id key — forbidNonWhitelisted => 400
insert with EMPTY data {} — 400 (no owner-only ghost row), never 5xx
update with no filter and only owner_id in data — immutable, scope intact, no mass-update
delete with no filter at all — guarded (filter required) or owner-scoped, never global wipe
upsert with no filter — conflict key falls back to scope only, no clobber of foreign rows
op unknown 'truncate' — invalid op enum => 400, never destructive
op 'grant' privilege-escalation verb — invalid op => 400
insert with created_by=foreign — non-scope identity col stripped or 4xx, not honored
insert with updated_by=foreign — undefined col, safe 4xx, no audit forgery
filter $regex on owner_id to fuzz-match foreign owners — bound/escaped, no leak
filter owner_id with comment-terminator -- to truncate predicate — bound literal, predicate intact
filter on a column = subquery string to read foreign rows — bound literal, no exec
aggregate alias as injection 'c; SELECT owner_id' — alias quoted, no exec/leak
aggregate field as injection to leak owner_id — field quoted, no leak
txn with 2 ops, second references foreign mount in resource-qualified form — caller mount only
DDL alter_column_type on owner_id to integer — would break scope; guarded/typed, never 5xx
DDL add_column with default referencing current_user — default is raw expr but owner still server-set
insert with owner_id key AND a value that equals the trusted-principal format — still stripped + reinjected
list filter owner_id = JSON-encoded object trying $gt all — bound, no range scan across tenants
get with filter that omits id and owner_id, name=common — own rows only, never foreign match
insert duplicate id within own scope — 409 conflict (PK), not a cross-tenant signal
upsert same id different name — updates OWN row only, never another owner's row of same id
